methods: Status init(bool loopback = false) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_init(toInternal(id_), loopback)); }
Status defaultConfig(bsp_fdcan_config_t &config, bool enableCanFd = false) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_get_default_config(toInternal(id_), &config, enableCanFd)); }
Status clock(std::uint32_t &frequencyHz) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_get_clock(toInternal(id_), &frequencyHz)); }

Status configureBitrate(bsp_fdcan_config_t &config, std::uint32_t nominalBitrate, std::uint32_t dataBitrate = 0U) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_config_bitrate(toInternal(id_), &config, nominalBitrate, dataBitrate)); }
Status init(const bsp_fdcan_config_t &config) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_init_ex(toInternal(id_), &config)); }
Status protocolStatus(bsp_fdcan_protocol_status_t &status) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_get_protocol_status(toInternal(id_), &status)); }
Status errorCount(bsp_fdcan_error_count_t &count) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_get_error_count(toInternal(id_), &count)); }
Status onReceive(bsp_fdcan_rx_callback_t callback, void *arg) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_register_rx_callback(toInternal(id_), callback, arg)); }
Status onTransmit(bsp_fdcan_tx_callback_t callback, void *arg) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_fdcan_register_tx_callback(toInternal(id_), callback, arg)); }
static constexpr std::uint8_t payloadSize(std::uint8_t dlc) { return dlc; }
Status init(TimerMode mode, std::uint32_t ticks) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_tim_init(toInternal(id_), toInternal(mode), ticks)); }
Status start() const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_tim_start(toInternal(id_))); }
Status stop() const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_tim_stop(toInternal(id_))); }
Status read(std::uint32_t &value) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_tim_get_counter(toInternal(id_), &value)); }
Status capture(std::uint32_t &value) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_tim_get_capture(toInternal(id_), &value)); }
Status compare(std::uint32_t ticks) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_tim_set_compare(toInternal(id_), ticks)); }
Status triggerOutput(bsp_tim_trigger_output_t output = BSP_TIM_TRIGGER_OUTPUT_UPDATE) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_tim_config_trigger_output(toInternal(id_), output)); }
Status triggerOutputUpdate() const { return triggerOutput(BSP_TIM_TRIGGER_OUTPUT_UPDATE); }
Status onEvent(TimerEventCallback callback, void *arg) const { return statusFromInternal(bsp_tim_register_event_callback(toInternal(id_), callback, arg)); }
